docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,543.37 FILED BY TSUI, TSZ KIN MARTIN AS TO DEFENDANT VILLEDROUIN, ANDRE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-12-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF ADVISED THAT HE COULD ATTEMPT COLLECTION ON JUDGMENT FOR VICTIM RESTITUTION ISSUED BY CRIMINAL COURTS BY VISITNG JUDGE: CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF TSZ KIN MARTIN TSUI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANDRE VILLEDROUIN IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
